subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One, Who is worthy and befitting of all glorification, Who hath through His special favors singled out one party from among all the parties of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزا که حزبی از احزاب عالم را بعنایات مخصوصه فائز
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
